tagline: Fort Lauderdale & Miami's Premier Luxury Pool Design, Leak Detection & Concierge Care

hero.headline: South Florida's Luxury Pool Artisans
hero.subheadline: For over 25 years, discerning homeowners across Fort Lauderdale and Miami have trusted Somar Pools with their most ambitious pool visions. From award-winning infinity-edge designs to white-glove weekly care, we deliver perfection you can dive into.

services.label: Our Expertise
services.headline: Luxury Pool Services Crafted<br class="hidden md:block"> for South Florida's Finest
services.subtitle: From visionary custom builds to precision leak detection and concierge-level maintenance, every service reflects our commitment to excellence and discretion.

cards.title: Custom Luxury Pool Design
cards.description: Estate pools with seamless integration to your architecture and lifestyle, combining visionary aesthetics with advanced engineering for breathtaking results.

cards.title: Pool Automation & Salinity
cards.description: Expert installation of Jandy iAqualink, TruSense chemistry monitoring, and AquaPure salinity systems for effortless smart pool management.

cards.title: Concierge Pool Maintenance
cards.description: White-glove weekly service by trained technicians who keep your pool pristine and swim-ready year-round, with detailed visit reports.

cards.title: Leak Detection & Repair
cards.description: Pinpoint accuracy using electronic listening devices, pressure testing, and dye-tracing technology to locate and resolve leaks fast.

cards.title: Award-Winning Renovations
cards.description: Transform your existing pool with updated finishes, modern tile, custom coping, and premium decking for a stunning refresh.

cards.title: Commercial Pool Service
cards.description: Professional maintenance, repair, and compliance services tailored for hotels, multi-family communities, and commercial properties across South Florida.

how_it_works.headline: Your Luxury Pool Experience in Three Steps

steps.title: Share Your Vision
steps.description: Tell us about your dream pool or service needs. We schedule a private consultation at your property to understand your goals, style, and timeline.

steps.title: Receive Your Custom Plan
steps.description: Our team designs a tailored proposal with transparent pricing, 3D renderings for new builds, or a detailed scope for maintenance and repairs.

steps.title: Relax and Enjoy
steps.description: From groundbreaking to weekly care, we handle every detail with precision and discretion. Your only job is to enjoy your stunning pool.

about.label: Why South Florida Trusts Somar
about.headline: 25+ Years of Luxury Pool Mastery in South Florida
about.description: Founded by licensed Florida pool contractor Mario Ramos, Somar Pools has earned the trust of celebrity clients, prestigious builders, and discerning homeowners across Miami-Dade, Broward, and Palm Beach counties. Our Pinnacle Design Award for a 600-sq-ft suspended saline infinity-edge pool and six consecutive Houzz Design Awards speak to our relentless pursuit of perfection. Every project reflects our core values: precision engineering, visionary design, and white-glove discretion.

features.title: Licensed & Award-Winning
features.description: Licensed Florida pool contractor with Pinnacle Design Award and six consecutive Houzz Awards for service and design excellence.

features.title: Smart Pool Technology Experts
features.description: Certified specialists in Jandy iAqualink automation, TruSense chemistry monitoring, and AquaPure salinity control systems.

features.title: White-Glove Discretion
features.description: Trusted by celebrity clients and elite communities for discreet, meticulous service that respects your privacy and property.

pricing.headline: Transparent Luxury Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every proposal is custom-tailored to your property. Flexible service plans with no hidden fees and no long-term contracts required.

guarantee.headline: Our "White-Glove" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If any service visit does not meet our exacting standards, we return and make it right at no additional charge. Somar Pools has built its reputation on exceeding expectations for over 25 years, and we stand behind every visit, every project, and every detail until you are completely satisfied.

faqs.question: What areas does Somar Pools serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Miami-Dade, Broward, and Palm Beach counties including Fort Lauderdale, Las Olas Isles, Harbor Beach, Miami Beach, Golden Beach, Coral Gables, Key Biscayne, Boca Raton, and surrounding luxury communities. We also serve select Caribbean projects.

faqs.question: How long does a custom pool build take?
faqs.answer: Timelines vary based on design complexity and permitting, but most luxury pool builds take 8-16 weeks from permit approval to completion. Mario personally manages every project timeline to minimize delays.

faqs.question: Do you offer pool automation upgrades for existing pools?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We specialize in Jandy iAqualink automation, TruSense chemistry monitoring, and AquaPure salinity control systems. We can retrofit most existing pools with smart technology for remote control and monitoring.

faqs.question: What makes your leak detection different?
faqs.answer: We use advanced electronic listening devices, pressure testing, and dye-tracing technology for pinpoint accuracy. Most leaks are located and repaired the same day, saving you time and money versus trial-and-error approaches.

faqs.question: Do you service commercial properties?
faqs.answer: Yes. We provide professional maintenance, repair, and compliance services for hotels, resorts, multi-family communities, and commercial properties across all three counties with flexible scheduling and dedicated account management.

testimonials.name: Rebecca L.
testimonials.text: The best company I have worked with. Great service and quality of work. They did an excellent job on our pool remodel. No hidden costs, cheap materials or shadiness. Somar continues to service our pool and we love knowing someone will be here on time every week.

testimonials.name: Ryan F.
testimonials.text: Mario and his team are amongst the most outstanding professionals we've worked with in Miami. He knows how to take an idea on paper and turn it into reality, making the pool design, permitting, and development process a breeze.

testimonials.name: Adrienne S.
testimonials.text: Somar Pools is TOTAL quality client service! Reliable, responsive, a pleasure to work with. It's like VIP service is their regular thing for ALL their clients! Owner Mario Ramos takes sincere pride in ensuring his customers are happy.
